title: Free Education Drive Lahore
description: A six-month educational program offering free tutoring and school supplies to underprivileged children in Lahore's low-income areas. Focused on literacy, numeracy, and STEM fundamentals.
goal: To bridge the educational gap for children who cannot afford formal schooling and prepare them for mainstream education.
futurePlans: We plan to open two more learning centers in Lahore and expand the program to include a digital literacy track with donated tablets and internet access.

title: Health Camp & Free Check-Up Peshawar
description: A week-long free medical camp providing basic health check-ups, eye tests, and free medicine distribution to over 1,500 residents in rural Peshawar.
goal: To provide accessible primary healthcare services to underserved rural communities and catch preventable diseases early.
futurePlans: We are working on a mobile health van that will visit remote villages monthly, and we're partnering with local pharmacies for sustained medicine supply.

title: Women Entrepreneurship Program
description: A three-month skill development and business mentorship program for women in Karachi, covering tailoring, handicrafts, digital marketing, and financial literacy.
goal: To empower women with marketable skills and seed funding to start their own micro-businesses and achieve financial independence.
futurePlans: We aim to launch a dedicated women's business incubator space and connect graduates with micro-finance institutions for startup loans.

title: Clean Water Initiative Quetta
description: Installation of water filtration plants in five drought-affected villages in Balochistan, providing clean drinking water to over 3,000 residents and reducing waterborne diseases.
goal: To eliminate waterborne diseases in target villages by installing sustainable filtration systems and educating communities on water hygiene.
futurePlans: We plan to install 10 more plants in surrounding districts and train local youth for maintenance to ensure long-term sustainability.
